parameters.query:
select
  p.product_id,
  p.product_raw_id,
  p.rule_top_category_id,
  p.rule_top_score,
  p.rule_shortlist_id,
  p.rule_decision_status,
  p.decision_status,
  s.product_type_guess,
  s.shortlist_count,
  s.shortlist_json,
  s.combined_text
from product_classification p
join classification_shortlist s
  on s.product_id = p.product_id
where
  p.decision_status = 'pending'
  and p.rule_decision_status in ('needs_llm', 'no_match')
order by p.product_id
limit 100;

INSERT INTO public.product_classification (
    product_id,
    product_raw_id,
    latest_run_id,

    workflow_version,
    prompt_version,

    rule_top_category_id,
    rule_top_score,
    rule_shortlist_id,
    rule_decision_status,

    llm_category_id,
    llm_confidence,
    llm_explanation,
    llm_needs_review,
    llm_validation_passed,
    llm_reject_reason,
    llm_raw_json,

    judge_category_id,
    judge_confidence,
    judge_explanation,
    judge_needs_review,
    judge_raw_json,

    fallback_2a_direction,
    fallback_2a_block_family,
    fallback_2a_family_code,
    fallback_2a_nosology_hint,
    fallback_2a_confidence,
    fallback_2a_explanation,
    fallback_2a_raw_json,

    fallback_2b_category_id,
    fallback_2b_confidence,
    fallback_2b_explanation,
    fallback_2b_raw_json,

    final_category_id,
    final_confidence,
    final_explanation,
    final_source,

    decision_status,
    next_action,
    routing_hint,
    updated_at
)
VALUES (
    {{ $json.product_classification_update.product_id }},
    {{ $json.product_classification_update.product_raw_id }},
    {{ $json.product_classification_update.latest_run_id }},

    {{ $json.product_classification_update.workflow_version ? "'" + $json.product_classification_update.workflow_version.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},

ON CONFLICT (product_id) DO UPDATE
SET
    product_raw_id = EXCLUDED.product_raw_id,
    latest_run_id = EXCLUDED.latest_run_id,

    workflow_version = EXCLUDED.workflow_version,

    judge_needs_review = EXCLUDED.judge_needs_review,
    judge_raw_json = EXCLUDED.judge_raw_json,

    fallback_2a_block_family = EXCLUDED.fallback_2a_block_family,
    fallback_2a_family_code = EXCLUDED.fallback_2a_family_code,
    fallback_2a_nosology_hint = EXCLUDED.fallback_2a_nosology_hint,
    fallback_2a_confidence = EXCLUDED.fallback_2a_confidence,
    fallback_2a_explanation = EXCLUDED.fallback_2a_explanation,
    fallback_2a_raw_json = EXCLUDED.fallback_2a_raw_json,

    fallback_2b_category_id = EXCLUDED.fallback_2b_category_id,
    fallback_2b_confidence = EXCLUDED.fallback_2b_confidence,
    fallback_2b_explanation = EXCLUDED.fallback_2b_explanation,
    fallback_2b_raw_json = EXCLUDED.fallback_2b_raw_json,

    final_category_id = EXCLUDED.final_category_id,
    final_confidence = EXCLUDED.final_confidence,
    final_explanation = EXCLUDED.final_explanation,

INSERT INTO public.product_classification_log (
    run_id,
    product_id,
    product_raw_id,
    stage,
    actor_type,
    actor_name,
    status,
    input_payload,
    output_payload,
    selected_category_id,
    confidence,
    explanation,
    validation_passed,
    error_message,
    workflow_version,
    prompt_version,
    decision_status,
    next_action,
    routing_hint,
    created_at
)

    {{ $json.product_classification_log_insert.product_id }},

);

insert into classification_runs (
    run_type,
    workflow_name,
    workflow_version,
    rules_version,
    primary_model_name,
    primary_model_version,
    prompt_version,
    status,
    batch_size,
    metadata
)
values (
    'stage2_primary_llm',
    'Pharmacy Stage 2 LLM',
    'v1',
    'rule_engine_v1',
    'deepseek-chat',
    'v1',
    'deepseek_shortlist_v1',
    'running',
    5,
    '{"trigger":"manual"}'::jsonb
)
returning id, run_type, workflow_name, workflow_version, started_at;

WITH stats AS (
    SELECT
        latest_run_id AS run_id,
        COUNT(*) AS total_count,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE decision_status = 'classified') AS success_count,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE decision_status = 'needs_human_review') AS needs_review_count,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE decision_status = 'error') AS error_count
    FROM product_classification
    WHERE latest_run_id = {{ Number($json.id) }}
    GROUP BY latest_run_id
)
UPDATE classification_runs cr
SET
    success_count = stats.success_count,
    error_count = stats.error_count,
    finished_at = NOW(),
    status = CASE
        WHEN stats.total_count = 0 THEN 'finished_empty'
        WHEN stats.needs_review_count > 0 THEN 'finished_with_review'
        WHEN stats.error_count > 0 AND stats.success_count = 0 THEN 'finished_with_errors'
        ELSE 'finished'
    END,
    metadata = COALESCE(cr.metadata, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
        'total_count', stats.total_count,
        'needs_review_count', stats.needs_review_count
    )
FROM stats
WHERE cr.id = stats.run_id
RETURNING
    cr.id,
    cr.run_type,
    cr.workflow_name,
    cr.workflow_version,
    cr.prompt_version,
    cr.status,
    cr.batch_size,
    cr.success_count,
    cr.error_count,
    cr.started_at,
    cr.finished_at,
    cr.metadata;
